approval_scope: TNBC only: independent C0/C1-full second-seed reproduction. No MoNuSeg training, no sealed TNBC access, and no new modules.

reference.first_seed_result_role: exploratory evidence; not used to alter this configuration

data.coverage: reuse the frozen shared train-only coverage manifest without refresh

optimization.legacy_no_prompt_behavior: no optimizer step and no replacement crop

primary_interpretation.comparison: C1-full minus paired C0 at fixed epoch 5
primary_interpretation.both_AJI_and_PQ_positive: second-seed repeat of the joint objective final-task signal
primary_interpretation.candidate_metrics: reported as mechanism context only; not an advancement gate and not evidence of stable candidate-generation improvement

retention.rolling_last: one complete model/model1/optimizer/scheduler/RNG state per arm, atomically replaced after each epoch
retention.best_pq: model/model1 weights only when development patient-macro PQ strictly improves
retention.epoch_metrics: all epochs retained as JSON/CSV and frozen diagnosis outputs
retention.expected_two_arm_storage_gib: about 18 to 20 including diagnostics and logs
